_comment: Single source of truth for every flower PRODUCT shown on the Home page, the Flowers shop, and the Flower Detail page. Edit this file only — flowers.js, flower-detail.js and main.js all read from it. To swap a photo for a real one, just change the 'image' URL; nothing else needs to change.

flowers.name: Navy Petals
flowers.description: A cozy, handcrafted mix of yarn sunflowers, blue blossoms, and favorite treats wrapped in a satin bow. An everlasting gift of warmth and sweetness.
flowers.meaning: Sunflowers symbolize adoration, loyalty, and pure warmth, perfectly paired with sweet treats to bring absolute joy and comfort.

flowers.name: Sunny Rose Bundle
flowers.description: A cozy, handcrafted arrangement of vibrant yarn sunflowers, pure white roses, and delicate orange accents. Elegantly wrapped in sage green paper with a classic satin bow.
flowers.meaning: Sunflowers symbolize adoration and loyalty, while white roses represent new beginnings and pure respect, making this bouquet a perfect gesture of heartfelt appreciation.

flowers.name: Rosy Sunshine Basket
flowers.description: A cozy, handcrafted mix of dusty pink sunflowers, white roses, and sweet strawberry treats wrapped in soft rose paper. A beautiful gift of gentle warmth.
flowers.meaning: Dusty pink sunflowers symbolize gratitude and gentle warmth, while white roses represent pure affection, making this a sweet gesture of comfort and care.

flowers.name: White Tulip Breeze
flowers.description: A single, oversized crochet rose in velvet pink and red yarn. Bold, romantic, and a forever keepsake.
flowers.meaning: Roses are the universal symbol of love and passion.

flowers.name: Garden Whisper
flowers.description: A charming, handcrafted dome of pink and rose-red yarn blossoms accented with large white petals. Encased in clear, bow-tied wrapping for a fresh, modern look.
flowers.meaning: Pink roses symbolize gratitude, grace, and joy, offering a gentle expression of admiration and sweetness.

flowers.name: Pastel Meadow Delight
flowers.description: A lively, handcrafted bouquet featuring an orange blossom, purple rose, and white calla lilies. Elegantly wrapped in cream paper with a delicate satin ribbon.
flowers.meaning: Purple roses represent enchantment and wonder, beautifully paired with cheerful orange and white blooms to celebrate creativity and bright new beginnings.

flowers.name: Lily of Valley Classic
flowers.description: A delicate, handcrafted arrangement of pure white crochet lily of the valley stalks. Finished elegantly with a premium brown and black paper wrap and a lace-trimmed accent.
flowers.meaning: Lily of the Valley traditionally symbolizes the return of happiness, sweet humility, and pure, everlasting love.

flowers.name: The Pink Tulip
flowers.description: A sweet, handcrafted bouquet featuring soft pink crochet tulips and delicate white blossoms. Elegantly wrapped in clear patterned film over a soft pastel pink layer.
flowers.meaning: Pink tulips represent deep affection, care, and good wishes, bringing a gentle message of happiness and warmth to someone special.

flowers.name: The Cheerful Daisy Bouquet
flowers.description: A bright, handcrafted trio of white, yellow, and soft pink crochet daisies. Thoughtfully wrapped in clean white paper and finished with a matching yellow ribbon.
flowers.meaning: Daisies represent pure innocence, loyal love, and a bright new beginning, spreading unconditional cheer and optimistic energy.

flowers.name: Golden Hour
flowers.description: Cool blue tones named for the way the yarn catches the light at golden hour. Simple, serene, striking.
flowers.meaning: Blue flowers are associated with calm, trust, and tranquility.

flowers.name: Midnight Peony
flowers.description: Full, ruffled peonies in a soft palette of yellow, white and pink — lush and romantic.
flowers.meaning: Peonies symbolize honor, wealth, and a happy marriage.

flowers.name: Soft Lavender
flowers.description: A single lavender-toned stem with a pop of yellow center — understated and calming.
flowers.meaning: Lavender represents calm, devotion, and serenity.

flowers.name: Wild Meadow
flowers.description: An untamed, meadow-style mix of greenery and white wildflowers, loose and natural.
flowers.meaning: Wildflowers represent freedom, joy, and untamed beauty.

flowers.name: Scarlet Devotion
flowers.description: Deep scarlet blooms in a dense, dramatic arrangement built for big declarations.
flowers.meaning: Red flowers are the classic symbol of deep love and devotion.

flowers.name: Lavender Lullaby
flowers.description: A soothing, all-purple arrangement designed to feel like a quiet evening — gentle, restful, fragrant in spirit.
flowers.meaning: Purple flowers represent grace, elegance, and admiration.

flowers.name: Midnight Blossom
flowers.description: Deep, near-black blooms set against blush pink for a dramatic, editorial-style arrangement.
flowers.meaning: Dark blooms symbolize mystery, depth, and rebirth.
